creator: joeo@watcher.nks.net
text:
This patch adds supports for the linuxulator into the tdfx and mga
	dri modules built by the current XFree86-4 port

Fix: this applies to the xc/programs/Xserver/hw/xfree86/os-support/bsd/drm/kernel 
directory.

It adds a dependency to having linux.ko loaded when mga.ko or tdfx.ko is 
loaded.
